Fix crawler pipeline: remove broken partition filter and fix Flyway version

- Remove partition-based URL filtering from CrawlScheduler that silently
  dropped URLs dequeued by the wrong downloader instance
- Remove incompatible flyway-database-postgresql:10.8.1 dependency that
  crashed url-seen (AbstractMethodError with flyway-core 9.x)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ping_agent: remove status updates, delegate to auth_agent

Ping agent now only records metrics and updates last_ping_at.
Status (online/offline) is managed exclusively by auth_agent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Gradle SIGSEGV crash in Docker builds on ARM (Apple Silicon)

Switch build stage from eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-alpine to eclipse-temurin:21-jdk
to avoid musl libc native library crash, and add --no-watch-fs flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Simplify connection path in architecture diagram

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update architecture diagram via draw.io desktop editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix sanityScore hint fatigue: add F1/golf venue names to exclusion list

Melbourne, Bay Hill, Australian GP circuit names, and other F1 venues
were being flagged as 'unknown athletes' by the sanity checker. These
are cities, golf courses, and race circuits — not athlete names.

Adds 12 venue/location terms to NON_ATHLETE_WORDS: Melbourne, Australian,
Bay, Hill, Bahrain, Jeddah, Monaco, Silverstone, Spa, Monza, Singapore,
Suzuka, Interlagos, Albert.

Fixes hint_fatigue pattern (15 fires, 0% effectiveness on sanityScore).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: suppress session ID UUID echoed by claude CLI on --continue

When using --continue, the CLI emits the session ID as a bare plain-text
line before the NDJSON stream. Filter it with Guid.TryParse to prevent
it appearing as chat text at the start of every continued response.

commit.message:
perf: skip LLM call when regex extracts all fields + parallelize claim creation

Scope parser now runs regex first — if it gets high confidence with all
critical values (roofSquares, roofRcv, totalRcv), skips the Claude API
call entirely (~5s → ~200ms for well-structured scopes).

Claim creation parallelizes entity resolution: contractor + carrier
resolve in parallel (step 1), then adjuster + sales rep in parallel
(step 2), cutting 4 sequential API calls down to 2 parallel batches.

fix: pass codeWorkspaceId in chatTitleUpdated event for sidebar icon

The sidebar icon (chat vs code) is determined by codeWorkspaceId on
each chat entry. When a new code chat was created, the chatTitleUpdated
event didn't include codeWorkspaceId, so the new sidebar entry showed
the regular chat icon instead of the code icon.

Now the finalize-chat response's codeWorkspaceId flows through the
event into sidebar-history and chats-page when creating new entries.

commit.message:
Add Supabase backend: Edge Functions, PII encryption, and admin proxy

Migrate data layer from WordPress MySQL to Supabase (PostgreSQL) with:
- 6 database migrations (core tables, RLS, audit logging, PII encryption, realtime, vault)
- 13 Edge Functions (chat, messages, conversations, settings, suggest, etc.)
- Shared modules for auth, CORS, encryption, extraction, and OpenAI
- PHP Supabase proxy class for admin operations (service role key stays server-side)
- Widget JS updated to call Edge Functions directly with session token auth
- Admin JS: conversation loading spinner, sort order, timestamp updates,
  retrain modal, extracted data live refresh, suggestion box stays collapsed
- Data extraction triggers on all messages (visitor + admin), not just AI responses
- Extracted data decryption via decrypt_pii RPC in both PHP render paths
- CI workflow for Supabase function deployment
- SECURITY.md with HIPAA compliance documentation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(forex): prevent duplicate positions on same pair

scanForSignals() was checking the module-level positions Map, but
UserForexEngine.tradingLoop() holds positions in this.positions.
Result: NZD_JPY and CAD_JPY each accumulated 2 open positions.

Fix:
- scanForSignals() now accepts heldPositions param (defaults to
  module-level positions for backward compat)
- tradingLoop() passes this.positions so pairs already held by the
  user engine are correctly excluded from scan results
- Added this.positions.has(signal.pair) guard before executeTrade()
  as a second line of defence

commit.message:
fix: corregir fórmulas MDE (pre-post con N total, DiD con N efectivo conservador)

- MDE pre-post: exp(2.80 * sqrt(1/N_post + 1/N_pre)) - 1 usando N individuales
- MDE DiD: aproximación conservadora con N_eff = media_celda × min(clusters) × meses
- Agregar nota metodológica (st.warning) en tab Poder
- Renombrar diseño DiD a "DiD (aprox. conservador)"
- F1_T0: MDE pre-post 56.6% → 7.2%, MDE DiD 40.0% → 13.6%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add gate server visibility and management to TUI (#351)

* fix: forward Content-Encoding and Git-Protocol headers to git http-backend

The git client gzip-compresses POST request bodies and sends
Content-Encoding: gzip. Without forwarding this as HTTP_CONTENT_ENCODING
in the CGI environment, git http-backend passes raw gzip bytes to
git-upload-pack, causing "bad line length character: git" protocol errors.

Also forward Git-Protocol for protocol v2 negotiation support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: reject mutually exclusive --inetd and --detach flags

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add gate server visibility and management to TUI

Add gate server awareness throughout the TUI: combined status display
in the project state panel, a full management screen accessible via
Ctrl+P command palette, startup health check notification, and periodic
60s polling with transition alerts.

- Combined gate status: "server down" overrides repo status when server
  is not running, since repo state is irrelevant without a working server
- GateServerScreen: shows mode/status/port/base-path with install,
  uninstall, start, stop, and refresh actions
- Command palette: "Git Gate Server" entry via get_system_commands
- Startup health check: warns if gate server is not running on TUI launch
- Periodic polling: 60s interval, notifies on running/stopped transitions
- Gate server actions: install/uninstall systemd, start/stop daemon via
  _run_suspended in ProjectActionsMixin

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Add initial poll in _start_gate_server_polling (consistent with other pollers)

fix: remove HTTP from allowed schemes to prevent cleartext rendering

Remove "http" from DomainPolicy.allowedSchemes so only HTTPS navigation
is permitted. All allowed domains (YouTube, Google, CDN) are HTTPS-only
in production, so there is no legitimate use case for plain HTTP. This
closes a trust-boundary gap where an active MITM attacker could serve
cleartext content before HTTPS redirect.

Closes #5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: graceful shutdown — send /exit before killing sessions (#44)

When `cove kill` or `cove all-kill` runs:
1. Disable pane-died respawn hook (prevents Claude from restarting)
2. Send C-c to interrupt, then /exit to trigger graceful exit
3. Poll up to 15s for Claude to exit (SessionEnd hooks fire)
4. Kill the tmux window/session

Adds --force/-f flag to skip graceful shutdown (instant kill).

This ensures SessionEnd hooks fire reliably, so capture-learnings.py
can extract learnings from the transcript before the process dies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: auto-detect WSL and use Windows host IP for Ollama

delegate-local.sh defaulted to localhost:11434 which doesn't work
from WSL (localhost refers to the WSL VM, not Windows). Now detects
WSL via /proc/version and reads the Windows host IP from resolv.conf.

Detection order: explicit OLLAMA_HOST > Docker > WSL > localhost
